content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Lemon.io: Senior Platform/Site Reliability Engineer Anywhere in the World 🇦🇩 Andorra, 🇦🇱 Albania, 🇦🇷 Argentina, 🇦🇹 Austria, 🇦🇺 Australia, 🇧🇦 Bosnia and Herzegovina, 🇧🇪 Belgium, 🇧🇴 Bolivia (Plurinational State of), 🇧🇷 Brazil, 🇧🇿 Belize, 🇨🇦 Canada, 🇨🇭 Switzerland, 🇨🇱 Chile, 🇨🇴 Colombia, 🇨🇷 Costa Rica, 🇨🇾 Cyprus, 🇨🇿 Czechia, 🇩🇪 Germany, 🇩🇰 Denmark, 🇩🇴 Dominican Republic, 🇪🇨 Ecuador, 🇪🇪 Estonia, 🇪🇸 Spain, 🇫🇮 Finland, 🇫🇷 France, 🇬🇧 United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, 🇬🇷 Greece, 🇬🇹 Guatemala, 🇭🇳 Honduras, 🇭🇷 Croatia, 🇭🇹 Haiti, 🇮🇩 Indonesia, 🇮🇪 Ireland, 🇮🇱 Israel, 🇮🇹 Italy, 🇯🇲 Jamaica, 🇯🇵 Japan, 🇰🇷 Korea (Republic of), 🇱🇹 Lithuania, 🇱🇺 Luxembourg, 🇱🇻 Latvia, 🇲🇦 Morocco, 🇲🇩 Moldova (Republic of), 🇲🇪 Montenegro, 🇲🇰 North Macedonia, 🇲🇹 Malta, 🇲🇽 Mexico, 🇲🇾 Malaysia, 🇳🇱 Netherlands, 🇳🇴 Norway, 🇳🇿 New Zealand, 🇵🇦 Panama, 🇵🇪 Peru, 🇵🇬 Papua New Guinea, 🇵🇭 Philippines, 🇵🇱 Poland, 🇵🇷 Puerto Rico, 🇵🇹 Portugal, 🇵🇾 Paraguay, 🇷🇴 Romania, 🇸🇪 Sweden, 🇸🇬 Singapore, 🇸🇮 Slovenia, 🇸🇰 Slovakia, 🇸🇻 El Salvador, 🇹🇭 Thailand, 🇺🇦 Ukraine, 🇺🇸 United States of America, 🇺🇾 Uruguay, 🇻🇳 Viet Nam, and 🇿🇦 South Africa Delaware AWS, Azure, Docker, GoLang, Linux, Python, Engineer, Senior, Full Time, DevOps, English, Kubernetes, Terraform, and CI/CD Pipelines DevOps and Sysadmin Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0076/3337/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> New York, NY <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://lemon.io">https://lemon.io</a> </p> <p>Are you a talented Platform/<span class="notion-enable-hover">Site Reliability&nbsp;</span>Engineer looking for a remote job that lets you show your skills and get decent compensation? Look no further than <a href="https://lemon.io/for-developers/?utm_source=weworkremotely&amp;utm_medium=job_ad&amp;utm_campaign=supply_en_sre/platform_engineer_jun_2026_job_ad">Lemon.io</a> — the marketplace that connects you with hand-picked startups in the US and Europe.</p> <p><strong>What we offer:</strong></p> <ul> <li>The rate depends on your seniority level, skills and experience. We've already paid out over $11M to our engineers.</li> <li>No more hunting for clients or negotiating rates — let us handle the business side of things so you can focus on what you do best.</li> <li>We'll manually find the best project for you according to your skills and preferences.</li> <li>Choose a schedule that works best for you. It’s possible to communicate async or minimally overlap within team working hours.</li> <li>We respect your seniority so you can expect no micromanagement or screen trackers.</li> <li>Communicate directly with the clients. Most of them have technical backgrounds. Sounds good, yeah?</li> <li>We will support you from the time you submit the application throughout all cooperation stages.</li> <li>Most of our projects involve working in a fast-paced startup environment. We hope you like it as much as we do.</li> <li>Through our community, we will connect you with the best developers from more than 75 countries.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements for Senior Platform Engineer:</strong></p> <ul> <li>4+ years of experience in Platform Engineering, DevOps, or SRE roles</li> <li>3+ years of experience with Python or Go</li> <li>3+ years of experience with Kubernetes</li> <li>Experience with AWS, Microsoft Azure, Linux, Docker, and CI/CD is required.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements for <span class="notion-enable-hover">Site Reliability Engineer</span>:</strong></p> <ul> <li>5+ years of experience in Platform Engineering, DevOps, or SRE roles</li> <li>5+ years of Linux experience</li> <li>3+ years of Kubernetes experience</li> <li>2+ years of Ansible experience</li> <li>Experience with Terraform, Puppet, and Chef is required</li> </ul> <p><strong>Other:</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>Strong technical skills: as a Senior Engineer, you are expected to be able to create projects from scratch and have a deep understanding of application architecture.</p> </li> <li> <p>Clear and effective communication in English — advanced ability to discuss business tasks, justify decisions, and communicate issues. Good self-presentation is also essential for upcoming client calls.</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong self-organizational skills — ability to work full-time remotely with no supervision.</p> </li> <li> <p>Reliability — we want to trust you and expect that you won’t let us and the client down.</p> </li> <li> <p>Adaptability and Flexibility — the ability to onboard the project promptly after accepting it and start delivering results quickly.</p> </li> </ul> <p>Sounds good for you? Apply now and join the <a href="https://lemon.io/for-developers/?utm_source=weworkremotely&amp;utm_medium=job_ad&amp;utm_campaign=supply_en_sre/platform_engineer_jun_2026_job_ad">Lemon.io</a> community!</p> <p><strong>NOT YOUR TECH STACK?</strong></p> <p>We have a variety of projects, so if you have 4+ years of commercial software development experience and are proficient in AI Agent Architecture, AI Automation Architecture, AI Engineering, React &amp; Python, React &amp; Golang, React &amp; Java, React &amp; Ruby, PHP &amp; Vue, Vue &amp; Node.js, React &amp; .NET, Android &amp; iOS, Blockchain (Web3/Solana), Angular &amp; Node.js, Vue &amp; .NET, Python &amp; Vue, DevOps with Azure DevOps, MLOps, Data Science, Angular &amp; PHP, Angular &amp; .NET, Symfony &amp; React, Symfony &amp; Vue, Symfony &amp; Angular, Symfony &amp; JavaScript &amp; Next.js &amp; TypeScript, Data Analysis, React &amp; PHP, Data Engineering, Project Management, React Native &amp; Node, Data Annotation, React &amp; Node.js, Svelte &amp; Python, Svelte &amp; Node.js, Svelte &amp; TypeScript, Rust, Shopify &amp; JavaScript, Vue &amp; Nuxt, PHP &amp; Laravel, UI/UX Design, Animation, Graphic Design, React &amp; Node &amp; React Native, .NET &amp; C#, Unreal Engine &amp; C++, Python &amp; LLM, Unity, or Machine Learning Engineering, we would be happy to connect with you and match you with a project that fits your experience.</p> <p>We do not provide visa assistance, and our cooperation model does not include the benefits typically offered with direct hire.</p> <p>We work with developers from 75+ countries across Europe, Latin America, North America (the U.S. and Canada), selected countries in Asia (Japan, Singapore, South Korea, the Philippines, Indonesia, Malaysia, Vietnam, Thailand, and Israel), Oceania (Australia, New Zealand, and Papua New Guinea), and Africa (including Morocco and South Africa).</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/lemon-io-senior-platform-site-reliability-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/lemon-io-senior-platform-site-reliability-engineer</a><
